## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between The RealReal and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content and SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and optimization, specializing in editorial content (80-90% of outputs) and programmatic solutions for e-commerce.](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [The RealReal faces challenges in creating differentiated fashion content and enriching product descriptions for a vast, unique inventory.](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed an 8-week strategy sprint to deeply understand The RealReal's needs and develop tailored AI workflows and content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Next steps include signing an NDA, scheduling a deeper dive meeting, and potentially involving The RealReal's brand team in discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering and Expertise

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former CMO at DeepRam, with a background in content strategy for major brands](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows and coding agents to automate content creation and enrichment processes](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor-in-chief and other industry experts](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Focuses on editorial content (80-90%) with some programmatic solutions for e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Clients include Webflow, Ramp, Reddit, and other major brands](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### The RealReal's Content Challenges

  - [Current blog (RealStyle) lacks differentiation in the competitive fashion content space](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Struggle to leverage internal data and expertise for compelling content](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Need to improve product descriptions for a catalog of over 1 million unique SKUs](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Balancing AI-generated content with human touch and authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Image generation limitations due to the unique nature of pre-owned luxury items](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

### GrowthX's Approach to Content Creation

  - [Utilizes custom AI workflows for research, content generation, and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Employs style guides and persona-based writing to create human-like content](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Incorporates editorial review and oversight to ensure quality and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Offers solutions for image search and metadata enrichment for visual content](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

### Proposed Collaboration

  - [8-week strategy sprint to deeply understand The RealReal's needs and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [No long-term commitment required; delivers actionable strategy and AI-ready artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Potential focus on revamping the RealStyle blog and improving SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Opportunity to involve The RealReal's brand team in the process](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [The RealReal to send a mutual NDA for GrowthX to sign](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Schedule a deeper dive meeting, potentially including members of The RealReal's brand team](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare more specific ideas based on The RealReal's context](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Explore potential improvements for the RealStyle blog as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [GrowthX to send meeting recording and company details for NDA purposes](https://fathom.video/share/MVBFsUeXd_8eQ-s_AsV4TRapZZ3Fs2Y3?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
